title: Manufacturing Engineer - UltraTech Cement - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - UltraTech Cement - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
UltraTech Cement is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ludhiana. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About UltraTech Cement:
UltraTech Cement is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with UltraTech Cement!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
